commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=dd7663a34aae53a46f7f4703f4e22545dedc52e3)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps the Ollama stream function with the shared plain-text tool-call compatibility wrapper and adds Ollama stream tests for bracketed and Harmony-style plain-text tool-call promotion.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +107. Total +115 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source inspection and the added regression tests show the failing shape: Ollama assistant text containing bracketed or Harmony-style tool-call payloads currently remains plain text unless the shared wrapper is applied. I did not run a live Ollama model in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the PR has no concrete actionable review finding and remains a maintainer draft review item.

target.title: fix(ollama): promote plain text tool calls
target.body:
## Summary
- Wrap Ollama native streams with the shared plain-text tool-call compatibility wrapper.
- Promote bracketed and Harmony-style tool-call text from small/local Ollama models into structured `toolCall` events when matching tools are available.
- Add Ollama stream regressions for bracketed `[tool] ... [END_TOOL_REQUEST]` and `commentary to=tool` forms.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/ollama/src/stream.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/tool-payload.test.ts` - passed, 3 files / 29 tests
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/ollama/src/stream.ts extensions/ollama/src/stream.test.ts` - passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint extensions/ollama/src/stream.ts extensions/ollama/src/stream.test.ts` - passed
- `git diff --check` - passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- AWS Crabbox `corepack pnpm check:changed` - run `run_63007c8cd66f`, lease `cbx_9c760afc22c6`, slug `violet-barnacle`; failed during `typecheck extensions` on existing current-main errors outside this branch:
  - `src/plugin-sdk/approval-reaction-runtime.ts(300,12): Property 'kind' does not exist on type 'ApprovalActionView'`
  - `src/plugins/discovery.ts(607,50/89): 'stat' is possibly 'null'`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Ollama models that emit tool requests as plain assistant text can now be recovered into structured tool calls through the shared provider compatibility path.

Real environment tested: Local linked OpenClaw worktree plus AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: The Vitest, format, lint, diff, autoreview, and Crabbox commands listed above were run after the patch.

Evidence after fix: Focused Ollama/plugin-sdk tests passed and cover both bracketed and Harmony-style plain-text tool-call promotion.

Observed result after fix: Matching plain-text tool-call payloads are emitted as `toolCall` events and stream completion is marked `toolUse`.

What was not tested: Full `pnpm check:changed` completion is currently blocked by unrelated current-main type errors listed above.
target.author: vincentkoc
